name: the CI closed-loop workflow has the vulnerability + SBOM gate step wired
command: grep -q 'Vulnerability + SBOM gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.github/workflows/closed-loop.yml" && grep -q 'doctor.sh --check vuln-scan --root' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.github/workflows/closed-loop.yml" && echo x10-ci-step 1>&2
